title: russelia tehuana
intro: Russelia tehuana, also known as the Coral Honeysuckle or Coral Trumpet, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, fever, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Russelia tehuana include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs, to create remedies for various ailments.
